title: Newborn Monument
description_en: A typographic monument unveiled on Kosovo independence day in 2008 and repainted each year by local artists.
description_sq: Monument tipografik i prezantuar ne diten e pavaresise se Kosoves ne 2008 dhe lyhet cdo vit nga artiste vendore.

title: Mother Teresa Cathedral
description_en: A Catholic cathedral consecrated in 2017 honoring the Albanian-born saint Mother Teresa.
description_sq: Katedrale katolike e shenjteruar ne 2017 ne nder te shenjtores Nene Tereza me prejardhje shqiptare.

title: National Library of Kosovo
description_en: A brutalist library covered in 99 domes and a metal lattice designed by architect Andrija Mutnjakovic.
description_sq: Biblioteke ne stil brutalist e mbuluar me 99 kupola dhe nje rrjete metalike e dizajnuar nga arkitekti Andrija Mutnjakoviq.

title: Sultan Mehmet Fatih Mosque
description_en: A 15th century Ottoman imperial mosque founded shortly after the conquest of Kosovo.
description_sq: Xhami osmane perandorake e shekullit XV e themeluar pak pas pushtimit te Kosoves.

title: Emin Gjiku Ethnographic Museum
description_en: A traditional Ottoman-era residential complex housing Kosovo ethnographic collections.
description_sq: Kompleks tradicional banimi nga epoka osmane qe strehon koleksionet etnografike te Kosoves.

title: Sinan Pasha Mosque
description_en: A 17th century Ottoman mosque dominating the riverfront of the old town.
description_sq: Xhami osmane e shekullit XVII qe dominon brigjet e qytetit te vjeter.

title: Prizren Fortress
description_en: A medieval Byzantine and Ottoman hilltop fortress overlooking the city of Prizren.
description_sq: Fortifikate mesjetare bizantine dhe osmane mbi qytetin e Prizrenit.

title: Stone Bridge of Prizren
description_en: A 16th century Ottoman stone bridge over the Lumbardhi river rebuilt after the 1979 flood.
description_sq: Ure guri osmane e shekullit XVI mbi Lumbardhin e rindertuar pas permbytjes se vitit 1979.

title: Our Lady of Ljevisha
description_en: A 14th century Serbian Orthodox church and UNESCO World Heritage Site with frescoes from the Palaiologos era.
description_sq: Kishe ortodokse serbe e shekullit XIV pjese e trashegimise UNESCO me afreske nga epoka Paleologe.

title: League of Prizren Complex
description_en: The 1878 birthplace of the Albanian national movement now restored as a museum.
description_sq: Vendlindja e Lidhjes Shqiptare ne 1878 e ristrukturuar sot si muze.

title: Patriarchate of Pec
description_en: A medieval Serbian Orthodox monastery complex and UNESCO World Heritage Site at the mouth of the Rugova canyon.
description_sq: Kompleks mesjetar i manastirit ortodoks serb dhe pjese e UNESCO ne hyrje te Kanionit te Rugoves.

title: Rugova Canyon
description_en: A dramatic 25 kilometer limestone canyon with hiking trails and via ferrata routes near Peja.
description_sq: Kanion gelqeror dramatik 25 kilometra i gjate me shtigje per hiking dhe rruge via ferrata afer Pejes.

title: Old Bazaar of Peja
description_en: A reconstructed Ottoman-era market quarter in the heart of Peja with traditional craft shops.
description_sq: Lagje tregu nga epoka osmane e rindertuar ne zemer te Pejes me dyqane te zejeve tradicionale.

title: Marash Park
description_en: A green park where the Lumbardhi river enters Peja from the Rugova canyon.
description_sq: Park i blerte ku Lumbardhi futet ne Peje nga Kanioni i Rugoves.

title: Ethnographic Museum of Peja
description_en: A traditional kulla house turned museum showing 19th century Kosovar urban life.
description_sq: Kulle tradicionale e shnderruar ne muze qe paraqet jeten urbane kosovare te shekullit XIX.

title: Hadum Mosque
description_en: A 16th century Ottoman mosque inside the Gjakova bazaar restored after the 1999 war.
description_sq: Xhami osmane e shekullit XVI brenda Carshise se Gjakoves e rindertuar pas luftes se 1999-tes.

title: Old Bazaar of Gjakova
description_en: The largest Ottoman bazaar in Kosovo with over 500 shops in restored stone buildings.
description_sq: Pazari me i madh osman ne Kosove me mbi 500 dyqane ne ndertesa guri te rikonstruktuara.

title: Ethnographic Museum of Gjakova
description_en: A restored Ottoman home displaying urban Albanian life from the 19th century.
description_sq: Shtepi osmane e ristrukturuar qe paraqet jeten urbane shqiptare te shekullit XIX.

title: Ibar Bridge
description_en: A symbolic bridge over the Ibar river dividing the Albanian south and Serb north of Mitrovica.
description_sq: Ure simbolike mbi lumin Ibar qe ndan jugun shqiptar dhe veriun serb te Mitrovices.

title: Miners Monument on Shahin Hill
description_en: A 1973 brutalist monument by Bogdan Bogdanovic honoring miners killed in the Second World War.
description_sq: Monument brutalist i vitit 1973 nga Bogdan Bogdanoviq ne nder te minatoreve te rene ne Luften e Dyte Boterore.

title: Trepca Mining Complex
description_en: A historic lead and zinc mining complex active in some form since the Roman era.
description_sq: Kompleks historik minierash te plumbit dhe zinkut aktiv ne nje forme apo tjeter qe nga epoka romake.

title: Atik Mosque of Gjilan
description_en: A late Ottoman mosque in the historic core of Gjilan dating to the 18th century.
description_sq: Xhami e vone osmane ne berthamen historike te Gjilanit qe daton ne shekullin XVIII.

title: Llapashtica Waterfalls
description_en: A series of waterfalls in the Karadak mountains south of Gjilan reached by a short forest hike.
description_sq: Seri ujevarash ne malet Karadak ne jug te Gjilanit qe arrihen permes nje ecje te shkurter neper pyll.

title: Coexistence Square of Ferizaj
description_en: A square where a mosque and an Orthodox church stand side by side as a symbol of religious coexistence.
description_sq: Shesh ku nje xhami dhe nje kishe ortodokse qendrojne krah per krah si simbol i bashkejeteses fetare.

title: Bifurcation of Nerodime
description_en: A rare natural site where the Nerodime river splits into two basins flowing toward different seas.
description_sq: Vend natyror i rralle ku lumi Nerodime ndahet ne dy pellgje qe rrjedhin drejt deteve te ndryshme.

title: Vushtrri Castle
description_en: A medieval Byzantine and Ottoman fortress in the center of Vushtrri.
description_sq: Fortifikate mesjetare bizantine dhe osmane ne qender te Vushtrrise.

title: Stone Bridge of Vushtrri
description_en: A nine-arch Ottoman bridge from the 14th century spanning the former bed of the Sitnica river.
description_sq: Ure osmane me nente harqe e shekullit XIV mbi shtratin e dikurshem te lumit Sitnica.

title: Adem Jashari Memorial Complex
description_en: A national memorial in Prekaz honoring the family of KLA commander Adem Jashari killed in 1998.
description_sq: Memoriali kombetar ne Prekaz ne nder te familjes se komandantit te UCK-se Adem Jashari te rene ne 1998.

title: Drenica Valley
description_en: The historic rural heartland of the Drenica region dotted with stone kulla tower houses.
description_sq: Krahina rurale historike e Drenices e shenjuar nga kullat e gurta tradicionale.

title: Mirusha Waterfalls
description_en: A protected cascade of thirteen waterfalls and emerald pools carved into the Mirusha canyon.
description_sq: Kaskade e mbrojtur me trembedhjete ujevara dhe pellgje smeraldi te gdhendura ne Kanionin e Mirushes.
